  ?superbowlA wdt:P31 wd:Q1418282 .
  ?superbowlA wdt:P191 ?winner .
  ?superbowlA wdt:P585 ?dateA .
  BIND(SUBSTR(STR(?dateA) , 1 , 4) AS ?year1_str)

  ?superbowlB wdt:P31 wd:Q1418282 .

  FILTER(?year2 = ?year1 + 1)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?year2)
LIMIT 1
